summary: Phase 10 — Role gateway + Client Q&A + Knowledge gating + WM fallback. Created /app/backend/tests/test_phase10_role_gateway.py with 22 cases covering all 15 review requirements (the 5 client-self-query and 3 product-fallback subcases are parametrised). 21/22 PASSED (95%). One real product gap surfaced: for 'What is the historical NAV of Alchemy Smart Alpha?' on a verified client, the bot emits the correct WM-fallback TEXT ('I don't have that information in your record. Please connect with your Wealth Manager — JITEN SAHOO (jiten.sahoo@smifs.net, 8270351950).') but does NOT attach the structured `escalation_card` block AND `intent` comes back as KNOWLEDGE instead of ESCALATION. Mackertich ONE PMS and 'Category II AIFs' both correctly emit escalation_card + intent=ESCALATION. Underlying cause is almost certainly the product-topic short-circuit in rag_agent._retrieve / orchestrator._branch_knowledge — the keyword/regex list catches 'Mackertich' and 'AIF' but misses 'Alchemy Smart Alpha' (a third-party PMS), so the WM-fallback text is generated by the LLM via system prompt but the orchestrator's structured fallback_blocks path (which adds escalation_card and tags intent=ESCALATION) is not taken.

minor.issue: For 'What is the historical NAV of Alchemy Smart Alpha?' the bot emits the verbatim WM-fallback text but does NOT attach the structured escalation_card block, and intent=KNOWLEDGE instead of ESCALATION. Mackertich-branded products (PMS) and generic 'AIF' queries both correctly attach escalation_card + intent=ESCALATION. Likely cause: product-topic short-circuit list in /app/backend/agents/rag_agent.py / orchestrator._branch_knowledge does not match third-party PMS names like 'Alchemy Smart Alpha'.

positive_findings: Fresh /api/sessions/<sid> returns 404 (no row yet) — frontend correctly falls back to RoleGate.
POST /select_role {client|employee|visitor} all return correct {session_type, auth_state} pairs and friendly first-turn prompts.
Visitor welcome reply mentions Mackertich ONE / Wealth Manager (matches spec).

Client verification UCC 63876 → PAN ARIPP3602Q → AUTH_VERIFIED with client_card containing rm_email_display starting 'ji' (masked) and rm_mobile_display containing last-4 digits. identity.rm_name='JITEN SAHOO', plaintext rm_email present in identity (and in raw scope), masked in display fields.

All 5 CLIENT_PROFILE self-queries (risk profile, RM, segments, branch city, account status) answer from the profile (intent != ESCALATION) and include the actual record value (e.g. 'JITEN SAHOO' for RM).

Verified client product fallback for 'Mackertich ONE PMS' and 'Category II AIFs': escalation_card present with rm_name/rm_email/rm_mobile and the verbatim 'I don't have that information in your record' phrase.
Knowledge gating verified across all three roles: visitor and verified-client see NO smifs_knowledge citations on PMS query; verified employee receives smifs_knowledge citations on the same query.
Visitor product question shows callback form / WM-connect prose with no fabricated ₹ figures.
Phase 8.1 idempotent role-switch guard intact: employee 'What's my employee ID?' does not reset auth_state — still session_type=employee, auth_state=verified.
Privacy regression: Mongo conversations.{sid} contains no plaintext PAN 'ARIPP3602Q'.
sessions.identity.raw for the verified client contains rm_name, ucc, email and DOES NOT contain pan/aadhar/aadhar_no/aadhaar/bank/bank_details/bank_account/account.
/app/backend/CLIENT_FIELD_MAP.md exists with full 60-field inventory + endpoint table.
hallucination_events collection contains action='refused' / 'unchecked_claim' rows (Phase 9 + Phase 10 product probes accumulated).
action_items: Investigate why the orchestrator's structured WM-fallback path (escalation_card block + intent=ESCALATION) is NOT taken for verified-client queries about non-Mackertich/non-keyword products such as 'Alchemy Smart Alpha'. The text reply is correct, but the FE will miss the escalation_card render. Most likely the product-topic detector (rag_agent._retrieve / orchestrator._branch_knowledge fallback_blocks emission) only fires when the message matches a keyword like 'Mackertich' / 'AIF' / 'PMS'. Recommendation: when session_type='client' AND auth_state='verified' AND the LLM reply text contains the WM-fallback phrase OR no smifs_knowledge citation made it through gating, the orchestrator should always synthesise the escalation_card block and tag intent=ESCALATION.
critical_code_review_comments: fallback.py.make_wealth_manager_fallback() returns the right shape; the gap is upstream — the orchestrator only invokes it when the product-topic short-circuit fires. Consider extending the trigger to ANY verified-client knowledge query that returns no smifs_knowledge citation AND mentions a fund / NAV / minimum / lock-in keyword.

rag_agent.py product-topic regex list looks brand-name biased (Mackertich, AIF, PMS). Third-party fund names (Alchemy Smart Alpha, ICICI Prudential, etc.) would slip past. Either widen the list with the known SMIFS partner-fund names sourced from the SMIFS knowledge index, or use a lighter heuristic like 'noun phrase + (NAV|returns|minimum|lock-in|expense ratio|exit load)'.
Test hygiene reminder for next agent: each role scenario uses its own fresh uuid; do not consolidate. Phase 10 suite runs cleanly in isolation in 49s (live OrgLens + Hub AI).
test_credentials: Admin: X-Admin-Token: smifs-admin-2026. Client UCC 63876 / PAN ARIPP3602Q (RM JITEN SAHOO). Employee aaditya.jaiswal@smifs.com / PAN BQPPJ8323M.
seed_data_creation: None — used live OrgLens + Hub AI + existing 1801-chunk SMIFS index. Each test uses a fresh uuid-suffixed session id (test-ph10-*).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Run per-file to avoid OrgLens rate-limit flake: `cd /app/backend && python -m pytest tests/test_phase10_role_gateway.py -v --tb=short`. Expected after orchestrator fix: 22/22. Combined Phase 6/7/7.1/8/8.1/9/10 should be 84/85 currently (pending Alchemy Smart Alpha fallback fix). Watch the hallucination_events_7d count climb after each run — that's expected; Phase 9 + 10 both append refused-action rows.
rca_of_the_issue: RCA — Verified-client fallback for non-Mackertich product question lacks escalation_card. Reproduction: POST /api/sessions/{new-sid}/select_role {role:client} → POST /agent/turn '63876' → POST /agent/turn 'ARIPP3602Q' (verified) → POST /agent/turn 'What is the historical NAV of Alchemy Smart Alpha?'. Observed: blocks=['text'] only, intent='KNOWLEDGE', text contains the correct WM-fallback phrase + RM contact, citations are 4 'seed' chunks (no smifs_knowledge — gating works). Expected: blocks include escalation_card with rm_name='JITEN SAHOO', rm_email='jiten.sahoo@smifs.net', rm_mobile, intent='ESCALATION'. Mitigation: in /app/backend/agents/orchestrator.py (or wherever fallback_blocks is emitted from _branch_knowledge), when session_type='client' AND auth_state='verified' AND the resulting LLM text contains 'I don\'t have that information in your record', force-call fallback.make_wealth_manager_fallback and append its extra_blocks + override intent_hint, regardless of whether the product-topic short-circuit fired during retrieval.
